description: This file defines repository functions for accessing and manipulating 'roles' data in a MySQL database within a Node.js backend. It includes functions for counting, listing, bulk inserting, and searching roles, with internal utilities for JSON parsing and role existence checks.

methods.name: _jsonParseIfNeeded(v)
methods.description: Parses JSON string if needed, otherwise returns the value as-is.

methods.name: countRoles()
methods.description: Returns the total number of roles in the roles table.

methods.name: listRoles({ limit = 1000 } = {})
methods.description: Retrieves a paginated list of roles, with JSON parsing for specific fields.

methods.name: bulkInsertRoles(roles)
methods.description: Inserts multiple roles into the database, generating UUIDs when not provided.

methods.name: _roleExists(roleId)
methods.description: Checks if a role with the specified roleId exists in the database.

methods.name: searchRoles({ q = '', industry = null, salaryRange = null, limit = 50 } = {})
methods.description: Performs a search for roles based on provided query, industry, salary range, with filters and limit.

ctags.name: searchRoles
ctags.pattern: /^async function searchRoles({ q = '', industry = null, salaryRange = null, limit = 50 } = {}) {$/
ctags.signature: ({ q = '', industry = null, salaryRange = null, limit = 50 } = {})
